title: NoCube's Food Desire
description: Your character now has their own food desires. Compatible with mods.
body:
![Food Desire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F9XouF4L/images/9fb3312b2645e9a3202a65fbe160ed7482ebfaf9.png)
Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-food-desire) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocubes-food-desire)

#### ❔Food Desire

A new system is added to encourage the preparation and consumption of a various meals! Sometimes your character will desire to eat something specific. Consume it in time to receive Exp & Well Fed effect, that temporarily boosts main stats! If you fail, nothing bad happens and you'll receive a new food desire to satisfy after a while.

#### 🥗Diets

Craft a Diet Book (bowl + paper) if you want to change your diet! The default Balanced Diet includes almost everything, but depending on your preferences or to make food desires harder or easier to satisfy, you can become a Vegetarian, an exclusive Carnivore or give on Sweets. It's up to you to decide!

#### 🏷️Compatibility

Playing with other mods is not necessary, but highly recommended to diversify your character's possible food preferences!

- [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival) - Three new Diet Types for the main dragon species (use Diet Book to choose them!)
- [TerraFirmaCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrafirmacraft) - Paleolithic diet replaces all other Diets, designed specifically for TFC progression!
- [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) - food support, food desires will become much more varied!
- [Aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) - food support
- [Aquaculture Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight) - food support


#### 💬Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-food-desire) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/nocubes-food-desire) modpacks and use this mod in your videos. A link to the mod page in the description is highly appreciated.

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (models, textures, data, etc) in other projects, put this mod behind any adfly-like links, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
